notes: Iteration #82 (Campaign SMA-32925): VPVR variant V6 - ETH/SOL only (no BTC).

V6 hypotheses: (1) ETH/SOL pair has different return dynamics vs BTC, (2) tighter entry z=2.5 + longer zscore_lookback=144 (3 trading days) regularizes, (3) higher max_holding_bars=72 gives mean-reversion more room.
Pairs: ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT - altcoin pair (no BTC dominance factor).
ETHUSDT 15m->30m resample; SOLUSDT 15m->30m resample (no native 30m parquet in workspace).
Funding filter: abs(funding_8h_ema(8 events)) < 0.0005 to enter - skips blowoffs (identical to V5).
in-sample sharpe >= 0.5 AND wf_ratio >= 0.5 -> [PROFITABLE] -> in_review ship-ready
in-sample sharpe >= 0.5 BUT wf_ratio < 0.5 -> done with [NOT-PROFITABLE-OOS] (overfit)
